SEARCH
Package app.service

Interface AnomaliesDetectionService<T extends TimeSeriesRow>

Type Parameters:
T - The underlying time-series data row type under evaluation, extending TimeSeriesRow.
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseAnomaliesDetectionService, BaseDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService, BaseFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService, QuantumAnomaliesDetectionService, QuantumDataRecordAnomaliesDetectionService, QuantumFinancialIndicatorsAnomaliesDetectionService
public interface AnomaliesDetectionService<T extends TimeSeriesRow>
Service interface defining operations for training anomaly detection models and evaluating datasets to identify abnormal financial records.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<AnomalyResult<T>>
    searchForAnomaly(smile.anomaly.IsolationForest isolationForest, List<T> data, double threshold)
    Evaluates a list of target financial records against a trained Isolation Forest dto to identify data points that exceed the specified abnormality threshold.
    smile.anomaly.IsolationForest
    trainIsolationForest(List<T> data, int treesNumber)
    Trains an Isolation Forest dto using the provided baseline context training dataset.
    static double
    validateThreshold(String threshold)
    Validates and parses a string representation of the contamination threshold.
    static int
    validateTreesNumber(String treesNumber)
    Validates and parses a string representation of the number of trees.

  • Method Details

    • trainIsolationForest

      smile.anomaly.IsolationForest trainIsolationForest(List<T> data, int treesNumber)
      Trains an Isolation Forest dto using the provided baseline context training dataset.
      Parameters:
      data - A List of generic historical time-series rows used to establish normal behavior.
      treesNumber - The number of trees to build during the anomaly detection process.
      Returns:
      A trained IsolationForest dto instance.

    • searchForAnomaly

      List<AnomalyResult<T>> searchForAnomaly(smile.anomaly.IsolationForest isolationForest, List<T> data, double threshold)
      Evaluates a list of target financial records against a trained Isolation Forest dto to identify data points that exceed the specified abnormality threshold.
      Parameters:
      isolationForest - The pre-trained IsolationForest engine to use for evaluation.
      data - The working List of target generic rows to scan for anomalies.
      threshold - The statistical contamination sensitivity limit mapping anomaly criteria.
      Returns:
      A List containing the evaluated AnomalyResult metrics for elements flagged as anomalous.

    • validateThreshold

      static double validateThreshold(String threshold) throws ValidationException
      Validates and parses a string representation of the contamination threshold.

      The threshold must be a valid floating-point number strictly between 0 and 1.

      Parameters:
      threshold - The string representation of the threshold to validate.
      Returns:
      The parsed double value of the threshold if valid.
      Throws:
      ValidationException - If the threshold is not a valid number, or if it is outside the range (0, 1).

    • validateTreesNumber

      static int validateTreesNumber(String treesNumber) throws ValidationException
      Validates and parses a string representation of the number of trees.

      The number of trees must be a valid integer strictly greater than 0.

      Parameters:
      treesNumber - The string representation of the number of trees to validate.
      Returns:
      The parsed int value of the trees number if valid.
      Throws:
      ValidationException - If the value is not a valid integer, or if it is less than or equal to 0.
